utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh there it is .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: That is not your regular dry cleaners .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I know , but that creep that I went on that date with goes to there so I have to find a new one .

emotion_cause.span: 3_that creep that I went on that date with goes to there so I have to find a new one .

utterances.text: What ? !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: A new grocery store .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: The universe said I was going to meet a nice guy and that is what they gave me ?

emotion_cause.span: 7_The universe said I was going to meet a nice guy and that is what they gave me ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: When I get up there I am going to kick some ass .

emotion_cause.span: 7_The universe said I was going to meet a nice guy and that is what they gave me ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Do not worry Phoebe , you are gonna meet someone . If I can meet a great guy , so can you .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah , we both can . And we both will .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , you did not have to come in with me .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Are you kidding ? This is where they get out stains ! Okay ? This is like Disneyland for me .

emotion_cause.span: 12_This is where they get out stains ! Okay ? This is like Disneyland for me .

utterances.speaker: Guy
utterances.text: Oh , excuse me ! I think you dropped s ... Wow !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: What ?

utterances.speaker: Guy
utterances.text: I am sorry , it is just that you are so incredibly beautiful .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh yeah well , I am sorry about that too , but what are you going to do ?

utterances.speaker: Guy
utterances.text: I hope you do not think I am crazy but I feel like I was meant to pick this up , do you believe in that kind of thing ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: A little . Now you are talking .

utterances.speaker: Guy
utterances.text: Would you like to go out and have a cup of coffee ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I ... I ... I would love to . Let me just tell my friend .

utterances.text: Ooh , an ink stain ! Hey , can I watch how you get this out ?
